title: Nomad Life Factory
description: Product factory for Fran's nomad-life tools: collect travel information first, then propose fixes, then gradually move toward bookings and proactive help. Scouts run on a daily cadence and are read-only by default; anything involving private data, production deploys, bookings, purchases, or external communication needs human approval. Every meaningful user-facing change must update a New Features modal so Fran can see what changed since his last open.

lanes.label: Signals
lanes.hint: Travel pain, missing context, import false positives, workflow friction, and ideas worth shaping.

lanes.label: Shape
lanes.hint: Action/feature proposals that need product judgment before implementation.
lanes.empty: No Nomad proposals waiting for shaping.

trigger.label: Scout Nomad
trigger.description: Run the read-only Nomad product scout and return concrete proposals with approval levels and eval gates.

input.title: Nomad Life Scout
input.objective: Build an integrated set of tools to make Fran's nomad life easier. Include calendar, flights, hotels/Airbnb. Start by collecting all information in one place, eventually branch out into bookings and more proactive help. Start fixing Fran's life, eventually productize.
input.context: Nomad Calendar is the current seed app at /home/xiko/nomad-calendar, deployed privately at nomad-calendar.repo.box. It already imports Gmail travel confirmations into a private monthly calendar with flight/stay layers. Do not inspect raw Gmail tokens, secrets, or raw SQLite/imported travel content; use code, docs, tests, project briefs, and aggregate behavior only. Standing delivery rule: every meaningful user-facing change must add/update a New Features modal or equivalent in-app delta surface that shows what changed since Fran last opened the app.

lanes.label: Ready
lanes.hint: Approved fixes or features with clear implementation prompts and gates.

trigger.label: Implement gated
trigger.description: Confirm before launching an isolated implementation branch against Nomad Calendar.

lanes.label: In motion
lanes.hint: Nomad work with an active run or ongoing operator action.

lanes.label: Needs Fran
lanes.hint: Private-data, booking, production, payment, or product-direction decisions.

lanes.label: Review
lanes.hint: Built or researched enough for Fran/Ocean to inspect.

transitions.message: Only humans mark Nomad work shipped from Review.

lanes.label: Done
lanes.empty: No completed Nomad work on this board.

guard.message: Move Nomad work through Review before marking it done.

schedules.name: Nomad daily life scout
schedules.description: Daily read-only scout for Nomad Life proposals. Enabled because Fran explicitly asked the factory to move on its own; implementation, private-data, booking, purchase, external-communication, and production actions remain gated.

Do not inspect raw Gmail tokens, secrets, raw SQLite databases, or raw imported travel content. Use code, docs, tests, project briefs, and aggregate behavior only.
